title: Costs
doc_html:
§1135.  Costs

In the settlement of a controversy under the provisions of R.S. 41:1133 and 41:1134, all costs incident to the settlement shall be paid out of the general fund of the State of Louisiana.
doc_text:
§1135.  Costs
In the settlement of a controversy under the provisions of R.S. 41:1133 and 41:1134, all costs incident to the settlement shall be paid out of the general fund of the State of Louisiana.
